# SkinCited Embed Widget

> Embeddable SkinCited widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/skincited-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://skincited.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.skincited.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/skincited-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/citedhealth/skincited-embed
- API: https://skincited.com/developers/

## CITED Health Widget Family

- [CitedHealth Widget](https://widget.citedhealth.com)
- [HairCited Widget](https://widget.haircited.com)
- [SleepCited Widget](https://widget.sleepcited.com)
- [GutCited Widget](https://widget.gutcited.com)
- [ImmuneCited Widget](https://widget.immunecited.com)
- [BrainCited Widget](https://widget.braincited.com)
- [WeightCited Widget](https://widget.weightcited.com)
- [HeartCited Widget](https://widget.heartcited.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
